007 CASTING AGENCY

Where Talent Meets Opportunity

EXCLUSIVE CASTING CALL — SOUTH AFRICAN COMMERCIAL CAMPAIGN

007 Casting Agency is currently seeking authentic South African talent for an upcoming premium TV commercial campaign filming in Sri Lanka for the South African market.

 MOM ROLE

We are seeking a Black South African woman who feels warm, grounded, natural, and genuinely relatable.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 30–35

• Medium-to-deep brown skin tone

• Natural 4B/4C hair or authentic cultural styling

• Healthy natural skin texture

• Warm smile and expressive eyes

• Soft, approachable features

• Genuine maternal energy

• Contemporary suburban South African presence

• No overly glamorous, editorial, or fashion-model aesthetics

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

PINK LADY ROLE

We are seeking someone energetic, humorous, charismatic, and naturally confident.

Requirements:

• Female, ages 20–30

• Medium-to-deep brown complexion

• Authentic Black South African features

• Natural textured African hair

• Athletic and physically active

• Relatable, vibrant presence rather than high-fashion or editorial

📍 IMPORTANT INFORMATION

Shoot Location: Sri Lanka
Tentative Shoot Dates: 12th–15th June 2026
Shoot Duration: 1 day
Usage: 2-year buyout for the South African market

All applicants must have a valid passport.

Talent Budget:
Up to R37,000

Final rates and contractual terms will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Production Covers:

- Return flights

- Hotel accommodation

- Per diem

📩 SUBMISSION REQUIREMENTS

Please submit the following:

Updated comp card (including name, age, and contact details)

Professional studio headshot

Medium shot

Full-length photographs

Introduction video filmed in landscape mode

Submit via WhatsApp/Email
0692215294
info.007casting@gmail.com

Submission Deadline:
20th May 2026

Serious applicants only.

007 Casting Agency reserves the right to shortlist suitable candidates before client presentation.

items.text:
Casting Call: Postapokalyptischer Indie Spielfilm “Gamma” 

Dreh Zeitraum: 27.06.2026 – 05.07.2026 (Teilzeitraum je nach Rolle auch möglich)
Ort: Insel Rügen, Mecklenburg-Vorpommern

Gesuchte Positionen:

* ROBERT, m, etwa 25-35, akzentfreies Englisch notwendig
* SARAH, f, etwa 25-35, Englisch notwendig, aber kann deutschen Akzent haben
* EGON - m, 40-65, deutsch-sprachig

Status: Independent / Low-Budget (No-Paid mit prozentualer Beteiligung and eventuellen Erlösen - schriftlich festgehalten)

Über das Projekt
“Gamma” ist ein Independent Postapokalyptischer Film in Spielfilmlänge in englischer Originalsprache mit einigen Szenen auf Deutsch. Die Geschichte folgt Robert & Sarah, einem Expat Paar aus Berlin auf einem “Digital Detox Retreat“ nach Rügen - bei dem sie eine Woche lang ihre Handys und Laptops zuhause lassen müssen. Leider verpassen sie dabei auch katastrophales Weltgeschehen und wachen eines Tages beim Ende der Welt auf. 

Was wir bieten:
Da wir das Projekt ohne Budget auf private Kosten des Produzenten stemmen, können wir leider keine Gage zahlen. Wir teilen aber mit jedem Crew Mitglied eine bestimmte Prozentzahl eventueller Erlöse und halten dies auch vertraglich fest. Für Unterkunft und Catering ist gesorgt. Ausserdem für wunderbare Strände vor und nach den Dreharbeiten. 

Drehzeiten: Anständige Drehzeiten mit nicht mehr als 10 Stunden am Tag plus Pausen. Ihr habt jede Menge Zeit vor und nach Drehbeginn in der Ostsee eine Runde zu schwimmen.

Unterkunft: Wir übernehmen die kompletten Kosten für deine Übernachtung in einem lokalen typischen Rügener Landhaus unweit von der Ostsee.

Catering: Für erstklassige Verpflegung (Frühstück, Mittag, Abendessen, Snacks, Getränke) ist gesorgt.

Portfolio-Material: Wir arbeiten mit professionellem Equipment (RED, DZO Objektiven), um Material auf Top-Niveau für dein Showreel zu schaffen.

Credits: Offizielle Nennung im Abspann, auf der Webseite, auf Social Media und auf IMDb.

Wir suchen motivierte Crew-Mitglieder die Erfahrung auf einem vollen Spielfilm sammeln wollen und verlässlich und professionell sich für das Projekt engagieren. Wenn das auf Dich zutrifft, bewirb Dich !!!

Bewerbung bitte per E-Mail an:

Alexander von Schulz

[jastorf@protonmail.com](mailto:jastorf@protonmail.com)

🎭 **Casting Female Performers – KPop Demon Hunters Theme (HUNTR/X)** 🎤✨

We’re casting **2 female performers (16+ / 18+)** for a fun, high-energy children’s party experience!

## 💖 Roles:

🩷 **Mira**
🖤 **Zoey ** 

## 📅 Event Details:

📍 Kinnelon, NJ
🗓️ May 16, 2026

⏰ Arrival: 4:15 PM
🎉 Performance: 5:00 – 6:00 PM

## 🎭 What You’ll Do:

✨ Meet & greet with kids
🎶 Music & dance interaction
🎈 Simple balloon twisting *(can teach basics!)*
💫 Fun, high-energy character engagement

## 💰 Pay:

**$140 flat rate**

## 🌟 We’re looking for:

✔ Reliable & punctual
✔ Comfortable with kids
✔ Positive, energetic presence
✔ Dance/movement friendly *(no professional experience required!)*

## 🎥 Auditions:

📲 Virtual (Zoom)
🗓️ By appointment

Use the link below or send a message

[https://forms.gle/QE2he3KXMaDfwcGq9](https://forms.gle/QE2he3KXMaDfwcGq9)

If you know someone who’d be a great fit, feel free to share!

🎭 **Casting Female Performers – KPop Demon Hunters Theme (HUNTR/X)** 🎤✨

We’re casting **2 female performers (16+ / 18+)** for a fun, high-energy children’s party experience!

## 💖 Roles:

🩷 **Mira**
🖤 **Zoey ** 

## 📅 Event Details:

📍 Kinnelon, NJ
🗓️ May 16, 2026

⏰ Arrival: 4:15 PM
🎉 Performance: 5:00 – 6:00 PM

## 🎭 What You’ll Do:

✨ Meet & greet with kids
🎶 Music & dance interaction
🎈 Simple balloon twisting *(can teach basics!)*
💫 Fun, high-energy character engagement

## 💰 Pay:

**$140 flat rate**

## 🌟 We’re looking for:

✔ Reliable & punctual
✔ Comfortable with kids
✔ Positive, energetic presence
✔ Dance/movement friendly *(no professional experience required!)*

## 🎥 Auditions:

📲 Virtual (Zoom)
🗓️ By appointment

## 📩 To apply:

Use the link below or send a message
👉 Include: **“KPop Demon Hunters – May 16”**

[https://forms.gle/QE2he3KXMaDfwcGq9](https://forms.gle/QE2he3KXMaDfwcGq9)

## 💫 Bonus:

If you know someone who’d be a great fit, feel free to share!

items.text:
SEEKING HMUA PAID
Looking for a HMUA to assist on a Non-Union feature film on Monday, May 18th and Tuesday may 19th. Looking for someone who can help with light glam on female talent and touch ups on background actors! This is a Paid position! 

Location: Pittsburg, PA 

Dates: May 18th-19th 

Rate: $250/12hrs

To apply, email me: sarah.turnermua@gmail.com

Even if you’re not Available for both days, please email me specifying which day you are available if interested! You will also likely not be needed the entire 12 hours but will still be paid the full amount regardless. KIT NOT PROVIDED, BRING YOUR OWN SUPPLIES! Food/crafty will be provided on set and you will receive on screen credit!

items.text:
Looking for A2/Sound Engineer for ‘Next to Normal’ (CHI)
My company Scene Five Productions is in search of an A2/Sound Engineer for our upcoming production of Next to Normal.

We are looking for a candidate who is comfortable live-mixing our actors mics. 

Our production runs over two weekends, at the Bramble Arts Loft: July 24th-26th and July 31-August 2nd. Additionally, our tech days are July 20th-23rd.

This position will have a stipend of $500.

If interested, please email scenefiveproductions@gmail.com with your resume!

Meet Lisa from Shoes Off At The Door — 
We’ve put together a brief monologue for those looking to audition for her character!! WE STILL GOT ROLES TO FILL SIGN UP NOW🔥🔥

We’re looking for raw talent, strong personalities, and storytellers from ALL backgrounds.

NO experience required.
Just bring authenticity, energy, and emotion.

🎬 Audition Theme:
“How would you act at a BBQ?”

🔗 Sign up in bio on IG @shoesoffatthedoorindy
📍 Indianapolis Production
📩 Submit audition videos:
shoesoffatthedoor@yahoo.com

items.text:
🎬 **PILNY CASTING – SERIAL “IN COLD ICE”**
📍 **Bydgoszcz i okolice**

Szukamy aktorów do serialu **„In Cold Ice”**.
Zdjęcia odbywają się **w języku angielskim**.

📅 Termin zdjęć: **15–18 maja**
🎥 Jeden dzień zdjęciowy na rolę.
🔹 HOKEISTA
* młody mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* wymagana komunikatywna znajomość języka angielskiego
* jedna kwestia po angielsku

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **600 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 OCHRONIARZ
* mężczyzna
* sportowa sylwetka
* rola bez kwestii

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **400 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

🔹 PASTOR
* mężczyzna w średnim wieku
* bardzo dobra znajomość języka angielskiego
* rola z tekstem

💰 Wynagrodzenie: **1000 PLN brutto / dzień zdjęciowy**

📩 Osoby zainteresowane prosimy o wiadomość prywatną
i przesłanie od razu:
* krótkiego **self-introduction po angielsku**
* wieku
* aktualnych zdjęć
* doświadczenia aktorskiego (jeśli jest)

🎬 Casting pilny!

items.text:
SINGING LESSONS

Clients currently on stages in the West End/Internationally.
I have West End & International Performance credits: Your Lie in April (West End), Frozen (West End), Evita (Regents Park), King and I (Au Tour)
4 University Degrees in Teaching/Singing & Performance.

Want to work as a performer?
Want to have fun again?
Got questions about singing technique even after training?

Lessons at Dance Attic, Fulham Broadway, SW6 1LY
Lessons available online.
Book in today for a £10 Intro Session at cris.fung@gmail.com

Chris Fung - Singing Teacher

Plus, opportunities to be scouted for professional work.

items.text: I am one of the Casting Directors for the upcoming StudioCanal feature film JOSEPHINE BAKER. We are currently seeking the role of **JOSEPHINE BAKER AT 12 YEARS OLD **and would like to put out this flyer for any kids who would be interested in auditioning. **We’re ideally looking for someone aged 12-16 to play 12.  No acting experience needed, but dance experience encouraged. **

BLACK/MIXED ETHNICITY. TIMING AND CHARISMA (NO TALLER THAN 155CM) SEND YOUR HEADSHOT & ν 10: 10: cj.liccasting@gmail.com ИK OR EUROPE BASED TALENT ONLY'

items.text:
**CASTING CALL – PAID, NON-UNION BRAND VIDEO**

Novel Productions is casting **two roles** for a small **30-second Brand Video**

**Shoot Location:** Vancouver, BC

**Shoot Date:** May 18, 2026 (4 hours)

**Compensation:** Flat rate of $250

**ROLES:**

• **Business Owner** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

• **Marketing Director** — Age **25–40** | Male, ethnicity open

**SUBMISSIONS:**

Please send **headshot, acting resume, and reel (if available)** to: **casting@novelproductions.ca**

**Subject line:**

*Novel Casting - Role Name - Your Name*

This is a non-union flat-rate project intended for digital usage.

Selected submissions will be contacted with sides and instructions for self-tape auditions.

We encourage submissions from actors of all backgrounds.
